novel_features.name: Price Watch
novel_features.description: SQLite price history with cron-friendly polling and threshold alerts across all sources

novel_features.name: Project Tracker
novel_features.description: Group saved products into named projects with cross-store running budget totals

novel_features.name: Stale Detector
novel_features.description: Re-fetches saved products and flags discontinued, out-of-stock, or price-changed items

novel_features.name: Spec Sheet Export
novel_features.description: Normalized product dimensions, materials, finishes extracted from unstructured retailer pages

novel_features.name: Brand Cross-Reference
novel_features.description: Shows which retailers carry a brand and at what price points across all sources

novel_features.name: Compound Category Search
novel_features.description: Multi-category fan-out with room-type shortcuts that chain searches across product categories to relevant sources

novel_features.name: Review Aggregation
novel_features.description: Cross-source review merging plus external review site integration for comprehensive product review coverage

narrative.headline: Search every major home furnishing retailer from one command line.
narrative.value_prop: reno-goat fans out a single product search query to Ferguson, West Elm, Rejuvenation, Article, and 8+ Shopify DTC stores in parallel, returning normalized results with prices, ratings, and availability. Category-based routing automatically sends your query to the retailers that carry that type of product. Local SQLite stores search history, price snapshots, and saved products for offline comparison.
narrative.auth_narrative: No API keys required. All sources use anonymous access or public tokens.

quickstart.comment: Search all sources for a specific product
Compare specific retailers sorted by price
Find active promotions across furniture retailers
Export your saved products as JSON

troubleshoots.fix: Ferguson redirects broad queries to category pages. Try a more specific product name.
These sources require browser clearance cookies and are stubbed in v1.
The storefront access token may have rotated. Run `reno-goat-pp-cli sources refresh` to re-discover tokens.
